emiratesid.ae
Class UAEIDCardLibJavaWrapper

java.lang.Object
  emiratesid.ae.UAEIDCardLibJavaWrapper

public class UAEIDCardLibJavaWrapper
extends java.lang.Object

Copyright (c) 2010 LOGICA. All Rights Reserved. Wrapper class for UAE_IDCardLib.dll exported functions

Since:
1.6
Version:
2.0
Author:
Hakim SEBSSI

Constructor Summary
UAEIDCardLibJavaWrapper()
           
 
Method Summary
static void InitializeWrapper()
          Called internally to initialize the wrapper and load the Dll
static void LoadConfiguration()
          Load the configuration file sm.cfg, this function is used with local sm
static char[] MW_Authenticate(java.lang.String readerName, java.lang.String szPin, char[] data)
          Sign the data with the Authentication KeyPair, the pin is not cached
static char[] MW_AuthenticateCSP(long hProvider, char[] data)
          Sign the data with the CSP using the Authentication Keypair, this function will prompt for the PIN just for the first time, once provided the PIN will be cached
static long MW_CaptureAndConvert(int SensorID, FTP_Template Template)
          SAGEM Capture and Convert function, that captures the fingerprint and convert it to the specified template format
static FTP_Image MW_CaptureImage(int SensorID, int FingerIndex)
          SAGEM capture function, to capture a fingerprint image
static char[] MW_Card_MOC_GetChallenge(long CardHandle)
          Generate MOC challenge
static char[] MW_Card_MOC_MutualAuthentication(long CardHandle, char[] SMCryptogramAndMac)
          Perform a mutual authentication with MOC applet on card
static long MW_CloseContext(long Context)
          Closes an established context, and releases all related resources
static long MW_Connect(long Context, java.lang.String ReaderName)
          Establish a connection with the specified PCSC card reader
static long MW_ConvertImage(FTP_Image Image, FTP_Template Template)
          Convert fingerprint image into a template
static long MW_Disconnect(long CardHandle)
          Disconnect a specific card connection and releases all resources
static long MW_EstablishContext()
          Establish PCSC Context
static char[] MW_ExportAuthCertificate(java.lang.String readerName)
          Export the Authentication Certificate
static char[] MW_ExportSignCertificate(java.lang.String readerName)
          Export the Signing (Non Repudiation) Certificate
static char[] MW_GenerateCardCryptogram(long CardHandle, char[] SM_Challenge)
          Generate a Card challenge from the ID Applet, the SM challenge
static char[] MW_GetATR(long CardHandle)
          Reads the ATR value of a specific card
static char[] MW_GetCardSerialNumber(long CardHandle)
          Reads Card Serial Number of the specified card
static char[] MW_GetChipSerialNumber(long CardHandle)
          Reads Chip Serial Number of the specified card
static char[] MW_GetCPLC0101(long CardHandle)
          Reads CPLC 0101 tag of the specified card
static char[] MW_GetCPLC9F7F(long CardHandle)
          Reads CPLC 9F7F tag of the specified card
static char[] MW_GetIssuerReferenceNumber(long CardHandle)
          Reads Issuer Reference Number of the specified card
static char[] MW_GetIssuerSerialNumber(long CardHandle)
          Reads Issuer Serial Number of the specified card
static long MW_GetLastErrorStatus()
          Returns the last error occured on the kernel
static long MW_GetMaxFailedMatch(long CardHandle)
          Retrieves the Maximum number of Failed Match left on the MOC applet
static char[] MW_GetMOCAlgorithmVersion(long CardHandle)
          Retrieves the Algorithm version used on the MOC applet
static char[] MW_GetMOCAppletState(long CardHandle)
          Reads the current MatchOnCard Applet state
static long MW_GetMOCBiometricInformationTemplate(long CardHandle, BIT Bit1, BIT Bit2)
          retrieves Biometric Information Templates on the connected card
static char[] MW_GetMOCSerialNumber(long CardHandle)
          Reads the current MatchOnCard Applet Serial Number
static long MW_Init()
          Calls the MW_Init native function to initialize the secure messaging module
static long MW_IsCardGenuine(long CardHandle)
          Check if the connected card is UAE genuine card
static java.lang.String[] MW_ListReaders(long Context)
          Discover all PCSC readers, and returns a list of readers names
static long MW_Match(FTP_Template Tpl1, FTP_Template Tpl2)
          Perform Match Off Card Operation
static long MW_MatchOnCard(long CardHandle, int ReferenceDataQualifier, FTP_Template Template1)
          Perform Match On Card Operation
static long MW_MOC_Verify(long CardHandle, char[] SM_Command)
          Verify SM Command
static long MW_ReadFingerprints(long CardHandle, FTP_Template tpl1, FTP_Template tpl2)
          Read Fingerprints stored on the card
static CardHolderPublicData MW_ReadPublicData(long CardHandle, boolean ReadPhotography, boolean ReadNonModifiableData, boolean ReadModifiableData, boolean SignatureValidation)
          Read the Card holder public data of the specified card
static char[] MW_SignData(java.lang.String readerName, java.lang.String szPin, char[] data)
          Sign the data with the Signing KeyPair, the pin is not cached
static char[] MW_SignDataCSP(long hProvider, char[] data)
          Sign the data with the CSP using the Signing Keypair
static char[] MW_SM_BuildSMCommand(char[] APDU_Command, char[] APDU_Data, int SM_Command_Case, char[] Kmac_session, char[] ICV_session)
          Build SM command using the specified parameters
static long MW_SM_CloseContext(long SM_ID, int Context)
          Close SM context of the specified SM Module ID and context
static char[] MW_SM_GetChallenge(long SM_ID, int Context)
          Generate a challenge from the specified SM Module
static char[] MW_SM_GetCipheredPIN(long SM_ID, int Context, int RefId_Pin1, int RefId_Key1, char[] CSN, char[] SM_Challenge, char[] CardCryptogram)
          Generate Ciphered PIN using the parameters passed
static long MW_SM_Init(long SM_ID, char[] PIN)
          Initialize a specified SM Module with its password
static char[] MW_SM_LoadRefIdInfo(long SM_ID, int RefId)
          Loads Reference ID Info for a specified SM Module
static char[] MW_SM_LoadRefIds(long SM_ID)
          Load the specified SM Module Reference IDs
static char[] MW_SM_MOC_GenerateSessionKeys(long SM_ID, int Context, int ContextExt, char[] CardCryptogram, char[] Kauth, char[] Kmac, char[] TRND)
          Generate MOC session keys using the specified SM Module
static Terminal MW_SM_MOC_MutualAuthentication(long SM_ID, int Context, int ContextExt, int RefAuthKey, int RefMacKey, char[] CSN, char[] RNDICC, char[] SNICC)
          Perform Secure Messaging MOC mutual authentication
static long MW_SM_OpenContext(long SM_ID)
          Establish SM context with the specified SM Module ID
static long MW_VerifyCipheredPIN(long CardHandle, char[] CipheredPin)
          Verify Ciphered PIN with SM module

Constructor Detail

UAEIDCardLibJavaWrapper

public UAEIDCardLibJavaWrapper()
Method Detail

InitializeWrapper

public static void InitializeWrapper()
Called internally to initialize the wrapper and load the Dll

LoadConfiguration

public static void LoadConfiguration()
                              throws MiddlewareException
Load the configuration file sm.cfg, this function is used with local sm

Throws:
MiddlewareException

MW_Init

public static long MW_Init()
Calls the MW_Init native function to initialize the secure messaging module

Returns:
0 if success

MW_GetLastErrorStatus

public static long MW_GetLastErrorStatus()
Returns the last error occured on the kernel

Returns:
last error code raised by the native library

MW_EstablishContext

public static long MW_EstablishContext()
Establish PCSC Context

Returns:
long value representing the established context, or 0 if failed

MW_ListReaders

public static java.lang.String[] MW_ListReaders(long Context)
Discover all PCSC readers, and returns a list of readers names

Parameters:
Context - valid context
Returns:
Array of discovered PCSC readers names.

MW_Connect

public static long MW_Connect(long Context,
                              java.lang.String ReaderName)
Establish a connection with the specified PCSC card reader

Parameters:
Context - valid context
ReaderName - a string identifying a specific PCSC reader
Returns:
long value represents a Card handle of the connected smart card, 0 if connect failed

MW_GetATR

public static char[] MW_GetATR(long CardHandle)
Reads the ATR value of a specific card

Parameters:
CardHandle - a valid handle to a connected card
Returns:
binary representation of the card ATR

MW_Disconnect

public static long MW_Disconnect(long CardHandle)
Disconnect a specific card connection and releases all resources

Parameters:
CardHandle - a valid handle to a connected card
Returns:
0 if disconnected successfully, otherwise if disconnect failed

MW_CloseContext

public static long MW_CloseContext(long Context)
Closes an established context, and releases all related resources

Parameters:
Context - a valid context
Returns:
0 if success, otherwise if failed

MW_GetCardSerialNumber

public static char[] MW_GetCardSerialNumber(long CardHandle)
Reads Card Serial Number of the specified card

Parameters:
CardHandle - a valid handle to a connected card
Returns:
binary representation of Card Serial Number

public static char[] MW_GetChipSerialNumber(long CardHandle)
Reads Chip Serial Number of the specified card

Parameters:
CardHandle - a valid handle to a connected card
Returns:
binary representation of Chip Serial Number

CardHandle - a valid handle to a connected card
Returns:
binary representation of Issuer Serial Number

Parameters:
CardHandle - a valid handle to a connected card
Returns:
binary representation of Issuer Reference Number

CardHandle - a valid handle to a connected card
Returns:
binary representation of CPLC 0101 tag

Reads CPLC 9F7F tag of the specified card

Parameters:
CardHandle - a valid handle to a connected card
Returns:
binary representation of CPLC 9F7F tag

                                                     boolean ReadPhotography,
                                                     boolean ReadNonModifiableData,
                                                     boolean ReadModifiableData,
                                                     boolean SignatureValidation)
Read the Card holder public data of the specified card

Parameters:
CardHandle - a valid handle to a connected card
Returns:
CardHolderPublicData instance contains public data

MW_IsCardGenuine

public static long MW_IsCardGenuine(long CardHandle)
Check if the connected card is UAE genuine card

Parameters:
CardHandle - a valid handle to a connected card
Returns:
0 if genuine, error code otherwise

MW_GetMOCBiometricInformationTemplate

public static long MW_GetMOCBiometricInformationTemplate(long CardHandle,
                                                         BIT Bit1,
                                                         BIT Bit2)
retrieves Biometric Information Templates on the connected card

Parameters:
CardHandle - a valid handle to a connected card
Bit1 - First Biometric Information Template
Bit2 - Second Biometric Information Template
Returns:
0 if success, error code otherwise

MW_GetMOCSerialNumber

public static char[] MW_GetMOCSerialNumber(long CardHandle)
Reads the current MatchOnCard Applet Serial Number

Parameters:
CardHandle - a valid handle to a connected card
Returns:
binary representation of MOC Serial Number

MW_GetMOCAppletState

public static char[] MW_GetMOCAppletState(long CardHandle)
Reads the current MatchOnCard Applet state

Parameters:
CardHandle - a valid handle to a connected card
Returns:
binary representation of MOC Applet State

MW_GetMaxFailedMatch

public static long MW_GetMaxFailedMatch(long CardHandle)
Retrieves the Maximum number of Failed Match left on the MOC applet

Parameters:
CardHandle - a valid handle to a connected card
Returns:
number of Maximum failed match

MW_GetMOCAlgorithmVersion

public static char[] MW_GetMOCAlgorithmVersion(long CardHandle)
Retrieves the Algorithm version used on the MOC applet

Parameters:
CardHandle - a valid handle to a connected card
Returns:
binary representation of MOC Algorithm Version number

MW_CaptureAndConvert

public static long MW_CaptureAndConvert(int SensorID,
                                        FTP_Template Template)
SAGEM Capture and Convert function, that captures the fingerprint and convert it to the specified template format

Parameters:
SensorID - sensor id
Template - the converted fingerprint
Returns:
0 if success, error code otherwise

MW_CaptureImage

public static FTP_Image MW_CaptureImage(int SensorID,
                                        int FingerIndex)
SAGEM capture function, to capture a fingerprint image

Parameters:
SensorID -
FingerIndex -
Returns:
captured image

MW_ConvertImage

public static long MW_ConvertImage(FTP_Image Image,
                                   FTP_Template Template)
Convert fingerprint image into a template

Parameters:
Image - image to be converted
Returns:
converted image

MW_MatchOnCard

public static long MW_MatchOnCard(long CardHandle,
                                  int ReferenceDataQualifier,
                                  FTP_Template Template1)
Perform Match On Card Operation

Parameters:
CardHandle - a valid handle to a connected card
ReferenceDataQualifier - the BIT on card to be used in match operation
Template1 - fingerprint template to be used in match operation
Returns:
0 if success, error code otherwise

MW_ReadFingerprints

public static long MW_ReadFingerprints(long CardHandle,
                                       FTP_Template tpl1,
                                       FTP_Template tpl2)
Read Fingerprints stored on the card

Parameters:
CardHandle - a valid handle to a connected card
tpl1 - The first template to be read
tpl2 - The second template to be read
Returns:

MW_Match

public static long MW_Match(FTP_Template Tpl1,
                            FTP_Template Tpl2)
Perform Match Off Card Operation

Parameters:
CardHandle - a valid handle to a connected card
Tpl - template to be used in match operation
isAuthenticated - true if applet already authenticated, false otherwise
Returns:
0 if success, error code otherwise

MW_GenerateCardCryptogram

public static char[] MW_GenerateCardCryptogram(long CardHandle,
                                               char[] SM_Challenge)
Generate a Card challenge from the ID Applet, the SM challenge

Parameters:
CardHandle - a valid handle to a connected card
SM_Challenge -
Returns:
the cryptogram generated by the card, 12 bytes

MW_VerifyCipheredPIN

public static long MW_VerifyCipheredPIN(long CardHandle,
                                        char[] CipheredPin)
Verify Ciphered PIN with SM module

Parameters:
CardHandle - a valid handle to a connected card
CipheredPin - 10 bytes in TLV format
Returns:
0 if successful

MW_ExportAuthCertificate

public static char[] MW_ExportAuthCertificate(java.lang.String readerName)
Export the Authentication Certificate

Parameters:
readerName - a valid PCSC reader name obtained from ListReaders function
Returns:
X.509 Certificate in DER encoded format representing the Authenticate certificate

MW_ExportSignCertificate

public static char[] MW_ExportSignCertificate(java.lang.String readerName)
Export the Signing (Non Repudiation) Certificate

Parameters:
readerName - a valid PCSC reader name
Returns:
X.509 Certificate in DER encoded format representing the Sign certificate

MW_SignDataCSP

public static char[] MW_SignDataCSP(long hProvider,
                                    char[] data)
Sign the data with the CSP using the Signing Keypair

Parameters:
hProvider - a valid GemSafe CSP handle, set to 0 if no handle is created
data - the data to be signed
Returns:
the signature in 128

MW_AuthenticateCSP

public static char[] MW_AuthenticateCSP(long hProvider,
                                        char[] data)
Sign the data with the CSP using the Authentication Keypair, this function will prompt for the PIN just for the first time, once provided the PIN will be cached

Parameters:
hProvider - a valid Gemsafe CSP handle, set to 0 if no handle is created
data - the data to be signed
Returns:
the signature in 128

MW_SignData

public static char[] MW_SignData(java.lang.String readerName,
                                 java.lang.String szPin,
                                 char[] data)
Sign the data with the Signing KeyPair, the pin is not cached

Parameters:
readerName - a valid PCSC reader name
szPin - the PIN of the PKI Applet
data - the data to be signed
Returns:
the signed data

MW_Authenticate

public static char[] MW_Authenticate(java.lang.String readerName,
                                     java.lang.String szPin,
                                     char[] data)
Sign the data with the Authentication KeyPair, the pin is not cached

Parameters:
readerName - a valid PCSC reader name
szPin - the PIN of the PKI Applet
data - the data to be signed
Returns:
the signed data

MW_MOC_Verify

public static long MW_MOC_Verify(long CardHandle,
                                 char[] SM_Command)
Verify SM Command

Parameters:
CardHandle - a valid handle to a connected card
SM_Command - SM command to be verified
Returns:
0 if success, otherwise if not verified

MW_Card_MOC_MutualAuthentication

public static char[] MW_Card_MOC_MutualAuthentication(long CardHandle,
                                                      char[] SMCryptogramAndMac)
Perform a mutual authentication with MOC applet on card

Parameters:
CardHandle - a valid handle to a connected card
SMCryptogramAndMac - SM Cryptogram and MAC used in the authentication
Returns:
Card generated cryptogram

MW_Card_MOC_GetChallenge

public static char[] MW_Card_MOC_GetChallenge(long CardHandle)
Generate MOC challenge

Parameters:
CardHandle - a valid handle to a connected card
Returns:
MOC challenge

public static char[] MW_SM_LoadRefIdInfo(long SM_ID,
                                         int RefId)
Loads Reference ID Info for a specified SM Module

Parameters:
SM_ID - Secure Messaging Module ID
RefId - Reference ID to be loaded
Returns:
Reference ID Info

MW_SM_LoadRefIds

public static char[] MW_SM_LoadRefIds(long SM_ID)
Load the specified SM Module Reference IDs

Parameters:
SM_ID - Secure Messaging Module ID
Returns:
Reference IDs

MW_SM_Init

public static long MW_SM_Init(long SM_ID,
                              char[] PIN)
Initialize a specified SM Module with its password

Parameters:
SM_ID - Secure Messaging Module ID
PIN - SM Module password
Returns:
0 if success, otherwise if failed

public static long MW_SM_OpenContext(long SM_ID)
Establish SM context with the specified SM Module ID

Parameters:
SM_ID -
Returns:

MW_SM_CloseContext

public static long MW_SM_CloseContext(long SM_ID,
                                      int Context)
Close SM context of the specified SM Module ID and context

Parameters:
SM_ID - Secure Messaging Module ID
Context - the context to be closed
Returns:
0 if success, otherwise if failed

MW_SM_MOC_GenerateSessionKeys

public static char[] MW_SM_MOC_GenerateSessionKeys(long SM_ID,
                                                   int Context,
                                                   int ContextExt,
                                                   char[] CardCryptogram,
                                                   char[] Kauth,
                                                   char[] Kmac,
                                                   char[] TRND)
Generate MOC session keys using the specified SM Module

Parameters:
SM_ID - Secure Messaging Module ID
Context - SM Module context
ContextExt - SM Module extended context
CardCryptogram - Generated card cryptogram
Kauth -
Kmac -
TRND -
Returns:
Generated session keys

MW_SM_BuildSMCommand

public static char[] MW_SM_BuildSMCommand(char[] APDU_Command,
                                          char[] APDU_Data,
                                          int SM_Command_Case,
                                          char[] Kmac_session,
                                          char[] ICV_session)
Build SM command using the specified parameters

Parameters:
APDU_Command - APDU Command
APDU_Data - APDU Data
SM_Command_Case - SM command case
Kmac_session - Kmac session
ICV_session - ICV session
Returns:
generated SM Command

MW_SM_MOC_MutualAuthentication

public static Terminal MW_SM_MOC_MutualAuthentication(long SM_ID,
                                                      int Context,
                                                      int ContextExt,
                                                      int RefAuthKey,
                                                      int RefMacKey,
                                                      char[] CSN,
                                                      char[] RNDICC,
                                                      char[] SNICC)
Perform Secure Messaging MOC mutual authentication

Parameters:
SM_ID - Secure Messaging Module ID
Context - SM context
ContextExt - SM extended context
RefAuthKey - Ref Auth Key
RefMacKey - Ref Mac Key
CSN - Card Serial Number
RNDICC -
SNICC -
Returns:
Terminal object

MW_SM_GetChallenge

public static char[] MW_SM_GetChallenge(long SM_ID,
                                        int Context)
Generate a challenge from the specified SM Module

Parameters:
SM_ID - Secure Messaging Module ID
Context - SM Context
Returns:
generated challenge

MW_SM_GetCipheredPIN

public static char[] MW_SM_GetCipheredPIN(long SM_ID,
                                          int Context,
                                          int RefId_Pin1,
                                          int RefId_Key1,
                                          char[] CSN,
                                          char[] SM_Challenge,
                                          char[] CardCryptogram)
Generate Ciphered PIN using the parameters passed

Parameters:
SM_ID - SM Module ID
Context - SM context
RefId_Pin1 - Ref ID PIN
RefId_Key1 - Ref ID Key
CSN - Card serial number
SM_Challenge - Generated SM challenge
CardCryptogram - Generated cryptogram
Returns:
Generated ciphered PIN
